subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Haji Mirza Kamalu'd-Din
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath distinguished Himself through glory and become singular in grandeur, and hath uttered the Word amongst all created things when [3.5s]... ...The question is that whereas in past Scriptures Isaac is said to have been the sacrifice; in the Qur’án this station is given to Ishmael. This is, undoubtedly, true
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی توحد بالعزه و تفرد بالعظمه و نطق بالکلمه بین البریه اذا مرت ... ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الله و سمع ندآئه الاحلی اذ ارتفع بین الارض و السماء
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @oneness; unity of religion, @Word of God and human limitations, @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God
